description_long: This is a rectangular black serving tray featuring a meal composed of saucy chicken pieces garnished with green herbs, a portion of golden French fries, and a small serving of shredded purple cabbage. The tray itself has a flat, slightly textured base and raised edges to prevent food from sliding off. The food is arranged neatly, with the fries and cabbage on one side and the chicken occupying the majority of the tray. The tray appears to be made of plastic, with a subtle sheen indicating a smooth, hard surface. There are no visible handles or decorative patterns, and the rim is simple and functional. The overall presentation is clean and modern, suitable for casual dining or takeout in an urban environment.
description: A sleek black plastic serving tray with raised edges, holding saucy chicken, fries, and purple cabbage. The tray is simple, modern, and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full meal arrangement with chicken, fries, and cabbage clearly visible on the black tray.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the depth of the tray and the vertical arrangement of the food, with the fries and cabbage more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back edge of the tray and the food from the opposite side, with the chicken and fries still visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the fries and cabbage, with the chicken partially obscured behind them.
attribute_rim_design: The rim is raised, approximately 1 cm in height, with a flat, straight edge and moderate thickness. It is simple and unadorned, designed to contain food securely.
attribute_reflective_properties: The tray surface is smooth with a semi-glossy finish, showing mild highlights and some soft reflections, especially along the edges. No mirror-like or highly reflective areas are present.
